text.title: Guardrails Implementation Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to ship a production guardrails pipeline above the basic stack.

step.name: define-config
step.input: Policy categories, latency budget, fail-closed default.
step.action: Author GuardrailConfig dataclass mirroring templates schema; single source of truth.

step.name: wire-input-pipeline
step.action: Ordered cheap-first: rule_based → moderation_api → llm_check. Each emits a record on block.

step.name: wire-output-pipeline
step.action: Validators run first; filters run on passing outputs only. Validator exceptions fail closed.
step.decision-gate: Unit tests separate validator and filter paths.

step.name: violation-log
step.action: Emit structured record per block. Schema matches violation-event.json. Sink retains ≥90 days.
step.decision-gate: Verify a sample violation appears in the sink end-to-end.

step.name: async-fanout
step.action: If >10 req/s and checks independent, run ThreadPoolExecutor fan-out. Per-check timeout enforces budget.
step.decision-gate: Smoke-test under load; verify p95 within budget.

step.name: rollout
step.action: Roll behind a feature flag at 10% → 50% → 100% over a week. Watch block-rate delta + latency.
step.decision-gate: Revert on regression on either axis.
